query_name: 検証_ビンゴ参加者の施術会計数
query_string:
with order_log as (
  select
    customer_id
    , id as order_id
    , purchased_datetime
  from
    _l1_mysql_pos.orders
  where substr(purchased_datetime, 1, 10) >= '2025-11-17'
        and substr(purchased_datetime, 1, 10) <= '2025-12-10'
        and coalesce(deleted, 0) = 0
        and cancel_datetime is null
        --and status = 2
        and registered_business_date is not null
        and total_amount_of_treatment_minutes > 0
  group by
    1,2,3
)

, agg_order as (
  select
    t0.customer_id
    , substr(created, 1, 10) as register_date
    , count(distinct order_id) as order_count
  from
    l2_verification.tmp_bingo_target_customer_251211 as t0
  left join
    order_log as t1
    on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
    and t0.created < t1.purchased_datetime
  group by
    1,2
)

select
  customer_id as "顧客ID"
  , register_date as "ビンゴ参加日"
  , order_count as "施術会計数"
from
  agg_order
where
  register_date >= '2025-11-17'
order by 2
